title: step
description: Domain verb: advance or reverse the forward pass by one or more ticks. Method name: 'rocket/step'.

direction.description: Whether to step forward or backward through the pass.

granularity.description: Override tick granularity for this step. Uses session default if omitted.

Response.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 result for 'rocket/step'. State status will be 'stopped' on success.

ticks_executed.description: Number of ticks actually executed. May be less than requested count if the pass boundary was reached.

stopped_at.description: Position where the forward pass is now stopped.
